name: §dTarantula
description:
§8Combat Pet

§7Strength: §c10
§7Crit Chance: §910%
§7Crit Damage: §930%

§6Webbed Cells
§7Anti-healing is §a30% §7less effective
§7against you.

§6Eight Legs
§7Decreases the mana cost of Spider,
§7Tarantula, Primordial and Spirit Boots
§7by §a50%§7.

§6Arachnid Slayer
§7Gain §b1.5x §7Combat XP against
§aSpiders§7.

§6Web Battlefield
§7Killing mobs grants §c+0.06❁ Strength
§7and §b+0.01✯ Magic Find §7for §a40s §7to all
§7players staying within §a20 §7blocks of
§7where they died. §8Stacks up to 10
§8times.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

variants.name: Greenbottle Tarantula Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aTarantula§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
